title: Animal Garden - Bull Shark
description: This mod adds the aggressive underwater creature, the bull shark into the game.
body:
![bg](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/d83mmflQ/images/21a42ab7d84776537916c9dcd30bd15c729f3bfa.gif)

This mod adds the aggressive underwater creature, the bull shark into the game.



They can be found in warm oceans, lukewarm oceans and rivers

and are rare, but if they are there, they will make you treasure your life more.


These hunters will not leave their target until they get a good bite out of it to solve their big appetite while leaving pool of blood behind.



It has a invisible hunger bar.
So it gets hungry over time. (5 minute until fully hungry)
Its hunger can be restored by handfeeding it,
when it eats dropped meat or fish items in water
or when it bites someone. (each will restore 30 second)

Damaging it makes its hunger go to 0 and goes on a rampage!

When it spawns its first hunger value will be a random number from 0 to 5 minute

so its possible that you encounter a really hungry one.



Has three behavior mode!
This will decide what it does with its selected prey.



Curious: (slow speed, when hunger is above 3 minute)
sometimes it will bite someone near to it and that will restore 30 sec hunger and will not continue the attack



Hungry: (normal speed, when hunger gets to 3 minute)
looks for smallest target near to it and bites it until its hunger is restored



Aggressive: (fast speed, when hunger gets to 1 minute)
when very hungry or when its attacked it will look for prey and until its hunger is restored it will attack everything by biting and slamming its target.



They stop attacking when its prey is on ground.

It prefers items over living targets when searching for a prey, so you have a chance to escape it if it still isn't locked on you!

Oh yeah and when it bites something it will restores its health a bit.



In forge you can change this and other spawn settings by editing the json files in the data -> biome tags and biome modifier folders or via resource pack and in fabric there is a config file for it.



Mod currently supports

**Forge 26.1.x | 1.21.11 | 1.21.10 | 1.21.9 | 1.21.8 | 1.21.7 | 1.21.6 | 1.21.4 | 1.21.1 | 1.20.1**

**Fabric 26.1.x | 1.21.11 | 1.21.10 | 1.21.9 | 1.21.8 | 1.21.7 | 1.21.6 | 1.21.5 | 1.21.4 | 1.21.1 | 1.20.1**

**Neoforge 26.1.x | 1.21.11 | 1.21.10 | 1.21.9 | 1.21.8 | 1.21.7 | 1.21.6 | 1.21.4 | 1.21.1**

![bye](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/d83mmflQ/images/21dd588672712dc02feb70589672824256dcd2f9.gif)
